reasoning: SPY at 736.64 at the premarket high ceiling (736.66), having gapped up +5.34 from prior session close (731.30). The BULL ribbon stack is intact and well below (fast 734.32, pivot 733.58, slow 732.80). The critical battle level is 734.6 (premarket low) — if price holds above it, the gap-up rally sustains with targets at psychological resistance (738, 739, 740). The risk: price is already at the PMH with limited room to run in premarket, and the risk-off sector rotation (XLK, XLF down) creates a headwind. Confidence is moderate because the upside target is pure psychological levels (1-star strength) while the support (734.6) is Active-tier 2-star. First test of 734.6 will be definitive.

primary.condition: if SPY holds 734.6 on first pullback test

tertiary.condition: if SPY holds 734.6 AND breaks above PMH (736.66)

key_observations: Price at the premarket high ceiling (736.66) with near-zero margin to test resistance; limited RTH upside in premarket.
BULL ribbon stack is 2+ dollars below price — strong structural support. If 734.6 breaks, the entire gap-up thesis is invalidated.
Risk-off sector rotation (XLK -33bp, XLF -44bp) is a cross-current to the BULL bias — suggests institutional caution despite the gap-up.
No Carry-tier resistance above price (only psychological 738/739/740 at 1-star); the overhead is weak. Upside targets are thin.
Premarket volume is moderate (50 bars, 23K-26K avg). RTH will determine if the gap holds or fills. Watch 734.6 as the first real test.
